title: Alert Definition Schema
description: Schema readiness for alert definition structure, covering alert severity levels, notification targets, threshold conditions, and suppression rules.

fields.name: alert_severity_levels
fields.purpose: Defines severity taxonomy for alert classification (critical, warning, info)

fields.name: notification_target_config
fields.purpose: Configuration schema for alert notification delivery targets

fields.name: threshold_condition_spec
fields.purpose: Specification for metric threshold conditions that trigger alerts

fields.name: alert_suppression_rules
fields.purpose: Rules governing alert suppression, deduplication, and noise reduction

fields.name: alert_escalation_policy_schema
fields.purpose: Schema defining alert escalation paths and timing

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real alert dispatch, no notification delivery, no escalation execution. Alerts remain non-functional until explicitly enabled.
